---
title: Webinar with KNBS
image: https://www.insee.fr/static/img/logoInseeFr.svg
date: "2026-03-18"
description: |
  <b>Description :</b> Classification of business activities by machine learning - The case of France
author: Nathan Randriamanana
slides:
  text: Slides
  url: /slides/webinar-subsaharan-africa-2026/index.html
order: 22
---
